productDisplayName: Fila Men Tribute Off White Navy Shoe
description: CompositionOff-white sneakers made with synthetic uppers, fabric lining and rubber sole shoe care1. Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThese off-white sneakers from fila have an updated retro look that is perfect for urban wear. The multi-layered white uppers with subtle blue and white panel strips gives greater support and protection. The perforations on the toe box ensure ample ventilation for the feet, keeping them cool and dry. The red rubber sole with the herringbone and circular grooves gives greater grip while the pivot point enables greater multi-directional movement.
